articles.title: Vitalik proposes lowering Ethereum validator threshold from 32 to 1 ETH
articles.description: Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin has proposed a significant update to Ethereums proof-of-stake consensus mechanism, suggesting that the validator lockup threshold be reduced from 32 ETH to 1 ETH.According to Buterin, lowering the minimum stake to 1 ETH would solve the issue preventing more people from solo staking, thereby democratizing staking and enhancing Ethereums...

articles.title: Vitalik Buterin Shares New Proposition For Ethereum’s The Merge
articles.description: Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin recently shared his insight into the protocol’s “the Merge” mechanism. His insight clarifies how the blockchain plans to achieve better functionalities moving forward Vitalik Buterin’s proposition aims to improve Ethereum’s Proof-of-Stake system despite its stability over the past two years. It will also enhance the chain’s overall performance. Improving...

articles.title: Tether explores lending billions to commodity traders to shake up traditional trade finance
articles.description: Tether Holdings, the issuer of the worlds largest stablecoin USDT, is exploring lending to commodities trading companies, according to a Bloomberg report.The crypto firm has held discussions with several commodity trading companies about potential US dollar lending opportunities, according to individuals familiar with the matter. Commodity traders, particularly smaller firms, often rely on...

articles.title: Kamala Harris to unveil campaign support for crypto and cannabis
articles.description: The Democratic candidate appears to further embrace cryptocurrency with her “Opportunity Economy” pitch.

articles.title: Solana’s TVL Surpasses $6B for the First Time Since January 2022 – What’s Driving the Growth?
articles.description: Solana’s DeFi ecosystem hits new highs as $SOL locked in protocols reaches a yearly peak of 40. 7 million, contributing to the $6 billion TVL milestone.

articles.title: Sui Crypto Price’s 120% Surge Ignites Insider Trading Allegations
articles.description:
The 120% price surge by Sui crypto is marred by insider trading allegations, raising concerns among investors.

The post Sui Crypto Price’s 120% Surge Ignites Insider Trading Allegations first appeared on Ecoinimist.

articles.title: Ripple CEO Slams SEC for Ignoring Court Ruling on XRP
articles.description: Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse accuses the SEC of defying court rulings on XRP, calling the agency a "renegade" for ignoring a judge's decision.

articles.title: Grayscale Eyes 35 Altcoins for Future Investment products
articles.description: Grayscale is reviewing 35 altcoins for future investment products, including new additions like Optimism and SUI, as it manages over $20 billion in assets.
